rationale: The skill scaffolds a Vercel Sandbox integration: it adds @vercel/sandbox via pnpm (touching package.json/lockfile/node_modules), reads Vercel credentials from env vars, and may write framework-specific server route files (e.g. app/api/cron/route.ts) plus a vercel.json crons block. At runtime the agent's local process invokes the Vercel Sandbox SDK against api.vercel.com to provision microVMs; the in-VM commands (dnf, npm, npx agent-browser, base64) execute remotely but are still spawned via the SDK's runCommand. Network reach therefore includes Vercel's API/runtime hosts and npm registries for installing @vercel/sandbox locally.
